scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.ci: npm run test:server && npm run test:client && cross-env VITE_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY=pk_test_ci_placeholder npm run build --prefix client
